elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.text: develop a credible and adequately supported appraisal

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.text: a condition rating of C5 or C6 or the quality rating is Q6. (Refer to Section 5605.5(a)

elements.text: (b) Desktop Appraisal Reports
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Desktop Appraisal Report is an appraisal assignment for which the scope of work does not
elements.label: text

elements.text: include fieldwork by the appraiser. The appraiser relies on property tax records, multiple
elements.label: text

elements.text: listing service information, past sales, prior appraisals and other data to complete the
elements.label: text

elements.text: appraisal report.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Desktop Appraisal Report requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Mortgage delivered with a Desktop Appraisal Report must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Be an Accept Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Be secured by a 1-unit Primary Residence with or without an ADU
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Be a purchase transaction Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Have a maximum loan-to-value (LTV) ratio of 90%.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Mortgages originated with a Desktop Appraisal Report that have an LTV ratio
elements.label: text

elements.text: higher than 90% (as calculated using the value obtained from the Desktop Appraisal
elements.label: text

elements.text: Report) are eligible for sale to Freddie Mac if the loan amount does not increase and
elements.label: text

elements.text: all other eligibility requirements continue to be met, including the requirement that
elements.label: text

elements.text: the LTV ratio calculated using the contract sales price is less than or equal to 90%. If
elements.label: text

elements.text: the LTV ratio increases above 90% because of an increase in the loan amount, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: appraisal report must be upgraded to a Traditional Appraisal Report.
elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Third-party data sources do not provide sufficient information about both the interior

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.text: presence of apparent defects, damages or deficiencies that indicate the property has a
elements.label: text

elements.text: condition rating of C5 or C6 or the quality rating is Q6. (Refer to Section 5605.5(a)
elements.label: text

elements.text: for additional information related to property condition and quality of construction.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Hybrid Appraisal Reports
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Hybrid Appraisal Report requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Mortgage is submitted to Loan Product Advisor®, the Last Feedback Certificate
elements.label: text

elements.text: must indicate the Mortgage is eligible for a Hybrid Appraisal Report.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: If the Last Feedback Certificate does not indicate the Mortgage is eligible for
elements.label: text

elements.text: delivery with a Hybrid Appraisal Report, but the Mortgage is eligible for automated
elements.label: text

elements.text: collateral evaluation (ACE), ACE+ PDR or a Desktop Appraisal Report, the Seller may
elements.label: text

elements.text: deliver the Mortgage with a Hybrid Appraisal Report.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Each Mortgage must be delivered with the ULDD Data Points described in the data
elements.label: text

elements.text: delivery instructions in Section 6302.8(a).
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Hybrid Appraisal Report is completed using a PDR. The lender must ensure that the
elements.label: text

elements.text: appraiser has the ability to contact the property data collector if the appraiser needs to
elements.label: text

elements.text: verify any information in the PDR to develop a credible and accurately supported Hybrid
elements.label: text

elements.text: Appraisal Report. (Refer to Section 5603.6 for property data collector requirements and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 5604.2 for PDR exhibit requirements.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: The PDR must be retained in the Mortgage file and must be submitted to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: through the Beyond ACE application programming interface (bACE API) prior to
elements.label: text

elements.text: delivery of the Mortgage.
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Hybrid Appraisal Report must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Be consistent with the information in the PDR, unless there is commentary addressing
elements.label: text

elements.text: any discrepancies
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Report the effective date of the appraisal report as the date the opinion of market
elements.label: text

elements.text: value was developed
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Ineligible Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: The following Mortgages are not eligible for delivery with a Hybrid Appraisal Report:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ CHOICERenovation Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Construction to Permanent Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ GreenCHOICE Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Mortgages secured by:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ 2- to 4-unit properties
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Manufactured Homes, including CHOICEHomes
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Proposed construction (i.e., the construction has not started and the description of
elements.label: text

elements.text: construction to be completed is based on plans and specifications and/or similar
elements.label: text

elements.text: documentation)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Renovation Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii)Hybrid Appraisal Report upgrade requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Hybrid Appraisal Report must be upgraded to a Traditional Appraisal Report when
elements.label: text

elements.text: one or more of the following conditions exists:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The PDR does not provide sufficient information about either the interior or exterior
elements.label: text

elements.text: physical characteristics of the subject property for an appraiser to develop a credible
elements.label: text

elements.text: and adequately supported appraisal
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ There are significant discrepancies (e.g., room count, living area, size, condition)
elements.label: text

elements.text: among available data sources, including the PDR, that cannot be reconciled by the
elements.label: text

elements.text: appraiser to develop a credible and adequately supported appraisal
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) ACE+ PDR upgrade requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller must analyze the information in the PDR and review the photographs. The Seller’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: review of the PDR may reveal that the subject property is not eligible for ACE+ PDR or has
elements.label: text

elements.text: characteristics that require the Seller to upgrade to a Traditional Appraisal Report or Hybrid
elements.label: text

elements.text: Appraisal Report as applicable to the property type. Property characteristics or conditions
elements.label: text

elements.text: that require a PDR to be upgraded to an appraisal report include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The building status is “Proposed” (not eligible for upgrade to a Hybrid Appraisal Report)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ 0 bedrooms above grade and/or 0 bathrooms above grade
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A measured finished area above grade of less than 400 square feet
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Mixed use property (i.e., altered or modified specifically to support or facilitate a non￾residential or income-producing use)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e) Exterior Appraisal Report use and upgrade requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Exterior Appraisal Report use
elements.label: text

elements.text: An Exterior Appraisal Report may be used only for an appraisal update or a subsequent
elements.label: text

elements.text: opinion of market value.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Exterior Appraisal Report upgrade requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: An Exterior Appraisal Report must be upgraded to a Traditional Appraisal Report when
elements.label: text

elements.text: one or more of the following conditions exists:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Third-party data sources do not provide sufficient information about either the interior
elements.label: text

elements.text: or exterior physical characteristics of the subject property for the appraiser to develop
elements.label: text

elements.text: a credible and adequately supported appraisal
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ There are significant discrepancies (e.g., room count, gross living area, size, condition)
elements.label: text

elements.text: among available data sources that cannot be reconciled by the appraiser to develop a
elements.label: text

elements.text: credible and adequately supported appraisal
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The property improvements are unable to be viewed from the street and/or an exterior
elements.label: text

elements.text: inspection does not provide sufficient information to develop a credible and
elements.label: text

elements.text: adequately supported appraisal
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The subject property is new construction
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The subject property is undergoing renovation or rehabilitation
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The data sources used to develop the appraisal, including the sales contract, reflect the
elements.label: text

elements.text: presence of physical deficiencies or adverse conditions that indicate the property has
elements.label: text

elements.text: an overall condition rating of C5 or C6 or the overall quality rating is Q6. (Refer to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 5605.5(a) for additional information related to property condition and quality
elements.label: text

elements.text: of construction.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The exterior inspection reveals apparent defects, damages or deficiencies
elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.text: Each appraisal report must meet the applicable requirements and include the exhibits specified
elements.label: text

elements.text: based on the type of property inspection or appraisal form type, as described below. Each PDR
elements.label: text

elements.text: must meet the applicable requirements and include the exhibits specified, as described below.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Exhibit documentation requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Photographs
elements.label: text

elements.text: Photographs of the subject property must be original color images that accurately depict
elements.label: text

elements.text: the property. The photographs must be clear, be appropriately identified and clearly show
elements.label: text

elements.text: the improvements, including any physical deterioration of the property, Amenities,
elements.label: text

elements.text: conditions or external influences that have a material effect on the market value or
elements.label: text

elements.text: marketability of the subject property.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Photographs of the comparable sales must be clear images. Copies of multiple listing
elements.label: text

elements.text: service photographs are acceptable.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Building sketch and floor plan
elements.label: text

elements.text: When required, the building sketch must include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Perimeter dimensions with calculations that reflect the measured areas of the dwelling
elements.label: text

elements.text: unit(s)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ All levels of the dwelling unit(s)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A separate building sketch for each additional structure on the subject property
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Exterior dimensions
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Room labels, when applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: When required, the floor plan must include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Interior walls
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Doorways
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Staircases
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Exterior ingress/egress
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Labels for each room, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The dimensions of all exterior walls
elements.label: text

elements.text: See Section 5605.5(c) for additional guidance on unusual floor plans.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (C)ANSI adherence and declarations
elements.label: text

elements.text: If adherence to the ANSI Standard is not possible, the appraisal report must include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The identifier “GXX001-” at the beginning of the Additional Features field,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ An explanation that addresses the lack of adherence, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ One of the ANSI-prescribed declarations that address departure from the ANSI
elements.label: text

elements.text: Standard
elements.label: text

elements.text: Examples that would require the use of an ANSI departure declaration include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Dwelling measurements are made without an interior inspection
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Area calculations for a proposed dwelling are based on plans and specifications
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Direct physical measurement of the dwelling dimensions is not possible
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Photographs

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.text: (C)ANSI Standard adherence and declarations
elements.label: text

elements.text: If adherence to the ANSI Standard is not possible, the measurement standard in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: URAR must be described as “Other,” and the appraisal report must include the reason
elements.label: text

elements.text: for the exception (i.e., not applicable due to property type, not applicable due to
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of law).
elements.label: text

elements.text: If adherence to the ANSI Standard applies with a declaration, the measurement
elements.label: text

elements.text: standard in the URAR is “ANSI,” and the applicable declaration must be included in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the sketch commentary section of the appraisal report
elements.label: text

elements.text: Examples that would require the use of an ANSI declaration include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Dwelling measurements are made without an interior inspection
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Area calculations for a proposed dwelling are based on plans and specifications
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Direct physical measurement of the dwelling dimensions is not possible
